summary: Completed iteration 5 testing: status_change trigger, notifications, order column spacing, link columns, and inline images in comments. Fixed bug in renderContent function that failed to detect relative image URLs (/api/uploads/...). Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified.

issues: React hydration warnings persist (span inside tr/tbody/th) - cosmetic only, known from iteration 2/3/4

fixed.issue: renderContent function regex only matched absolute URLs (https://...), not relative /api/uploads/ URLs
fixed.fix: Updated regex to also match /api/uploads/ patterns for inline image rendering

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/config/options returns trigger_types including 'status_change'
BACKEND: POST /api/automations accepts trigger_type='status_change' with trigger_conditions
BACKEND: POST /api/orders/{id}/comments creates comment and notifications for other users
BACKEND: GET /api/notifications returns structure with notifications list and unread_count
BACKEND: PUT /api/notifications/read marks all notifications as read
BACKEND: GET /api/notifications with limit parameter works
BACKEND: PUT /api/orders/{id} updates order fields (status_change triggers automations)
BACKEND: Custom fields like job_title_a can store link values
BACKEND: GET /api/notifications returns 401 without auth
BACKEND: PUT /api/notifications/read returns 401 without auth
FRONTEND: Notification bell icon (data-testid='notifications-btn') visible in header
FRONTEND: Clicking bell opens notification dropdown (data-testid='notifications-dropdown')
FRONTEND: Orden column has adequate left spacing (x=62px, not cut off by checkbox/comment)
FRONTEND: Orden column header found (data-testid='column-header-order_number')
FRONTEND: JOB TITLE A and JOB TITLE B columns appear in table headers
FRONTEND: Link-type cells show '+ Agregar enlace' placeholder when empty
FRONTEND: AutomationsModal has 'Un estado cambia a...' trigger option in dropdown
FRONTEND: CommentsModal has camera icon for image upload (data-testid='upload-image-btn')
FRONTEND: CommentsModal has comment input textarea and send button
FRONTEND: CommentsModal renders uploaded images inline (as tags with data-testid='comment-image') - AFTER FIX
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: renderContent() in CommentsModal only matched https:// URLs for inline images, missing relative /api/uploads/ paths. Fixed by updating regex to include /api/uploads/ pattern.
React hydration warnings still present - span elements inside tr/tbody/th. Low priority cosmetic issue from previous iterations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All iteration 5 features verified (after inline image fix)

seed_data_creation: Used existing orders from previous iterations. Backend tests create and cleanup test automations/comments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified: 1) status_change trigger type available in /api/config/options and AutomationsModal - shows 'Un estado cambia a...' option. 2) Orden column spacing fixed with left-11 class - column not cut off. 3) Comment notifications working - POST /api/orders/{id}/comments creates notifications for other users. 4) Inline images in CommentsModal now working - fixed regex to detect /api/uploads/ relative URLs. 5) JOB TITLE A/B link columns showing with '+ Agregar enlace' placeholder. Fixed 1 bug during testing. Session token still valid.

features_verified.status_change_trigger: Working - backend accepts trigger_type='status_change', frontend shows option in AutomationsModal
features_verified.notifications: Working - bell icon, dropdown, unread_count badge, mark as read all functional
features_verified.orden_column_spacing: Working - column positioned at x=62px with adequate left spacing
features_verified.link_columns: Working - JOB TITLE A/B visible, '+ Agregar enlace' placeholder shown
features_verified.inline_images: Working (after fix) - /api/uploads/ URLs now render as tags instead of text

bugs_fixed_during_testing.description: CommentsModal inline images not rendering for uploaded images
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: renderContent() regex only matched https:// URLs, not relative /api/uploads/ paths
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated regex from /(https?:\/\/[^\s]+\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp))/gi to also include /\/api\/uploads\/[^\s]+\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp)/ pattern
